About me

Outside data + ML, this is where I spend my energy.

Hobbies
5

Working Out

Current numbers: 245 bench, 365 squat, 405 deadlift.

Food Exploration

Sushi enthusiast who loves both fine dining and great street food finds.

Piano

Been playing for 11+ years, from disciplined practice to expressive pieces.

Mystery Fiction

I like analyzing clues and trying to solve the story before the ending. Always open to recs.

Pickup Soccer

Fast-paced games that keep me sharp, competitive, and active.

4

Quick hits
